## Type of Change

<!-- Keep the relevant items, delete the rest -->

- **Added** — New feature or capability.
- **Changed** — Update to existing behavior/UI.
- **Fixed** — Bug fix.
- **Security** — Vulnerability patch.
- **Refactor** — Code improvement without functional changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have followed the project's code style.
- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug` runs successfully.
- [ ] I have verified that `ludens.properties` configurations are respected.
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the `[Unreleased]` section.
- [ ] (If applicable) Documentation in the `docs/` folder has been updated.
- [ ] My PR targets the `develop` branch.
